title: Certificate of stock
doc_html:
§1091.  Certificate of stock

A.  Each certificate of stock shall contain reference to any and all agreements among the corporation's shareholders made pursuant to R.S. 12:1094.  

Added by Acts 1979, No. 225, §1, eff. July 9, 1979.
doc_text:
§1091.  Certificate of stock
A.  Each certificate of stock shall contain reference to any and all agreements among the corporation's shareholders made pursuant to R.S. 12:1094.
Added by Acts 1979, No. 225, §1, eff. July 9, 1979.
